nodes.name: Extract Run 2 (temp 0.3)
nodes.notes: Temperature 0.3 — slight variation to probe consistency.

nodes.name: Extract Run 3 (temp 0.6)
nodes.notes: Temperature 0.6 — more variation. If this agrees with runs 1 and 2, the value is robust.

nodes.name: Self-Consistency Check
nodes.notes: Compares all 3 LLM runs. Full agreement (3/3) → +0.10 confidence boost. Partial (2/3) → -0.05 penalty. No agreement (0/3) → force MANUAL_REVIEW. All null → confident not_found.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ received: true, tender_id: $json.tender_id, bidder_count: $json.bidder_ids.length, status: 'processing' }) }}

nodes.name: Build Evidence Prompt1
nodes.notes: Builds three LLM request bodies with temperatures 0.0, 0.3, 0.6. Same prompt, different temperatures. The consistency check node compares the three outputs.

nodes.name: Format Evidence for FastAPI1
nodes.notes: Converts internal shape to FastAPI schema. Passes consistency_detail and force_manual_review through so FastAPI can store them and WF-4 can read them.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
